content: Achieving UHC requires progressive implementation strategies: (1) Expand mandatory prepayment mechanisms (taxation or insurance) to pool risks across populations; (2) Prioritize essential service packages based on burden of disease and cost-effectiveness; (3) Eliminate user fees at point of service for priority interventions; (4) Strengthen primary care as foundation for service delivery; (5) Implement strategic purchasing to improve efficiency. Countries like Thailand achieved near-universal coverage within a decade through tax-funded schemes covering outpatient, inpatient, and prevention. Evidence shows UHC reduces poverty, improves health outcomes, and increases economic productivity.
